name: How is fault figured out when a Chicago attorney blames Google AI Overview for bad brief?
description: Attorney's fault for not verifying; AI no defense.[2]

mainEntity.name: How is fault figured out when a Chicago attorney blames Google AI Overview for bad brief?

acceptedAnswer.text: Attorney's fault for not verifying; AI no defense.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Fault lies with the attorney for failing to verify AI outputs, as courts hold lawyers to professional standards requiring diligence beyond AI reliance, per NY sanctions case.[2] AI unreliability doesn't excuse negligence. Factors: did lawyer represent AI as verified? Harm causation. Opposing counsel can move for sanctions. Document your reliance; counter with malpractice if harmed.
